title: Sagenia palmata
taxonomy: Sagenia palmata is a species of fern in the family Matoniaceae. It belongs to the genus Sagenia and is a type of tree fern. The species is native to tropical Africa and is characterized by its large, palmate fronds. Sagenia palmata is closely related to other species in the Matoniaceae family, such as the genus Matonia. The classification of Sagenia palmata is further divided into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, and class Polypodiopsida.
